title: Moon Giant Eva 20
wikitext:
[]: Moon Giant Eva 2.0 [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Mar 21, 2010 3:11 am the malaysian version is released(most probably pirated) but it has subs so i dont care. anyway i was watching it and i missed this when i was watching the cinema version. what the fudge is that why is lilith's clone being dissected and are they using parts of her to make unit 6. ane why is the upper eye swollen and is that blood or blood covering its face or is it calcite in attempt to seal it?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 21, 2010 3:34 am This goes in Rebuild, not Discussion. And what you have is a DVD of the crappy camrip. Anyway, remember 1.0? The "Moon Giant" is really Eva Mark-06. And Lilith is still in Dogma at Nerv-HQ, she just has a different mask on than in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Sun Mar 21, 2010 3:59 am They put a fancy sticker on her mask. I used to put fancy stickers on stuff when I was little.
